untranslatable_reason: Put-call ratio is not available in the allowed indicator list. The signal specifically requires put-call ratio thresholds which were marked as AUTHOR_SILENT (not disclosed). Substituted india_vix as a volatility/sentiment proxy for contrarian trading logic, but this is not a direct equivalent. Put-call ratio requires custom data ingestion to backtest accurately.
translation_notes: MCMILLAN_DRY_232 uses contrarian put-call ratio logic: high ratio = bullish, low ratio = bearish. Since put-call ratio is not in allowed indicators and threshold values are AUTHOR_SILENT, this translation cannot be executed accurately. Attempted proxy using india_vix (market sentiment indicator) as a substitute for contrarian mean-reversion signals, but this fundamentally changes the signal logic. Recommend: (1) Add put-call ratio as custom indicator, or (2) Use actual put-call ratio data source external to backtest engine, or (3) Obtain threshold values from original source material.
